title: Add Windows release CI workflow
description: Add .github/workflows/release.yml that triggers on v* tags. Verifies pyproject version matches tag, runs all four quality gates (pytest + ruff check + ruff format --check + mypy), builds both onedir-zip and onefile-exe with PyInstaller, computes SHA256SUMS, generates release notes via git-cliff from conventional commits, updates CHANGELOG.md in repo, creates GitHub release with assets, auto-detects prereleases (-rc/-beta/-alpha). No code signing - SmartScreen warning in release notes.
